# API spec version labels for multi-version docs benchmarking.
# Each line: COMMIT_SHA|VERSION_LABEL
# 35 dated versions derived from a public open-source API specification repo.
# Commit SHAs point to the corresponding release so each version uses a real,
# historically different OpenAPI spec.
# Ordered newest-first.
